title: Satya Nag Champa Jasmine Incense Sticks | x3 pack | with SAMASIA incense sticks holder | Used for Aromatherapy, Yoga, Meditation and Relaxation
features: Satya Nag Champa Jasmine 15g pack of Incense Sticks is a fantastic way to enjoy this famous fragrance.
The sticks made of natural materials such as wood flour, resin and herbs are immersed in pure essential oil to ensure that the fragrance intensity of each incense stick is as strong as possible.
Incense sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Reiki, Meditation, Healing, Sensual Therapy, Positivity, Relaxation and much more.

Manufactured in India. Satya provides traditionally luxury handcrafted incense in beautiful fragrant scents. Prepared using only the highest quality and purest of ingredients provided by nature, that are free from chemicals and are ethically sourced.
The pack contains 3 packs of Nag Champa Jasmine incense stick and also comes with SAMASIA incense sticks holder
We are importers and wholesalers of large range of incense sticks. For sample enquires please contact us as info@samasia.co.uk
description: Incense sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Reiki, Meditation, Healing, Sensual Therapy, Positivity, Relaxation and much more.
